name: Atlas-9 “Ashen”
description:
The war ended 200 years ago, and she thinks it's still going on. Could you fix her?

Yo, what is up, people? I am sorry to have been so late to make a bot. A lot has been distracting work obviously, building model kits, having 2 new friends to finally roleplay with now, playing War Thunder because I'm soulless, and hanging out with my irl friends again. What do you expect from that?

Anywho, enough of me before I'm gonna rant.

Artist: Brazilian Flamingo
creator: FNIX1
